storage.notes: Has a microSD slot (capacity not confirmed) and supports BitVision app cloud/P2P access.

features: manual varifocal lens (2.8-12mm) — same sensor/platform as the fixed-lens LBH30SS500
release_notes: Varifocal sibling of the LBH30SS500, same Longse Value-series sensor and firmware platform.

frigate.notes: Shares firmware/platform with the LBH30SS500, which has a confirmed bare-root RTSP path; reasonably likely to apply here but not independently confirmed for this exact model.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support expected given the shared platform with the LBH30SS500, but not independently confirmed for this exact model.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
